title: Bray's Better Ores
description: A pack that brings glorious variety to all ore textures!
body:
![Brays Better Ores](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd00dc1346cedc0bb6b35acfdd2f9fa421b6037a.png)
---------------------
**Bring some variety to stone & deepslate ores!**

---
Support for modded ores coming in the future :)
